title: rubus plicatus
intro: Rubus plicatus, also known as the folded-leaved bramble or folded-leaved raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus plicatus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
